allow:
Bash(python3 -c "
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    page = browser.new_page\(viewport={'width': 1440, 'height': 900}\)
    page.goto\('http://127.0.0.1:8000'\)
    page.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/book-agent-current-full.png', full_page=True\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/book-agent-current-hero.png'\)
    browser.close\(\)
print\('Screenshots saved'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
with sync_playwright\(\) as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\)
    page = browser.new_page\(viewport={'width': 1440, 'height': 900}\)
    page.goto\('http://127.0.0.1:8000'\)
    page.wait_for_load_state\('networkidle'\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/book-agent-v3-hero.png'\)
    page.evaluate\('window.scrollTo\(0, 600\)'\)
    page.wait_for_timeout\(300\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/book-agent-v3-mid.png'\)
    page.screenshot\(path='/tmp/book-agent-v3-full.png', full_page=True\)
    browser.close\(\)
print\('Screenshots saved'\)
")
